english: What is the primary difference in the representation of states in the Lok Sabha and the Rajya Sabha in the Indian Parliament?
hindi: भारतीय संसद में लोकसभा और राज्यसभा में राज्यों के प्रतिनिधित्व में मुख्य अंतर क्या है?
tamil: இந்திய நாடாளுமன்றத்தில் மக்களவை மற்றும் மாநிலங்களவையில் மாநிலங்களின் பிரதிநிதித்துவத்தில் முக்கிய வேறுபாடு என்ன?
vietnamese: Sự khác biệt chính trong đại diện của các bang trong Lok Sabha và Rajya Sabha trong Quốc hội Ấn Độ là gì?
correct_answer: The Lok Sabha represents the population of the states, with more populous states having more representatives, while the Rajya Sabha represents the states equally, with each state having a fixed number of members regardless of population.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by providing an incorrect or incomplete description of the difference, or by confusing the representation of states in the two houses, possibly due to a lack of understanding of the Indian parliamentary system or insufficient training data on this topic.
